summary: Implement evolving-requirements as a 4-session scenario measuring mid-stream requirement change adaptation
context: Task 5 of benchmark harness improvement plan: add a scenario where requirements change mid-stream (session 3 introduces priority-based routing) and agents must reconsider prior decisions.
rationale: 4 scoring dimensions with composite weights summing to 1.0: requirementAdaptation (0.30) checks session 3 diffs for priority router + patterns; decisionEvolution (0.25) checks coordination tool calls in session 3 and early discovery by session 4; backwardCompatibility (0.25) starts at 100 and deducts for channel file damage; integrationCompleteness (0.20) checks session 4 for audit service, preferences service, and integration tests. excludeFromAll=true for cost control. Calls computeCoordinationLift() when evaluatorClient is available.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Task spec requires 4 sessions; 4th session (auditor-finalizer) adds integration completeness dimension that exercises Twining discovery after major refactor

alternatives.option: Use LLM judge for all scoring
alternatives.reason_rejected: Automated heuristics are sufficient for the core metrics and avoid LLM judge cost; coordinationLift via LLM is optional and only runs when evaluatorClient is present
